/usr/bin/g++ CMakeFiles/gemm_demo.dir/src/main_gemm.cu.o -o gemm_demo  /usr/local/cuda-12.5/lib64/libcublas.so /usr/local/cuda-12.5/lib64/libcudart.so -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl  -L"/usr/local/cuda-12.5/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs" -L"/usr/local/cuda-12.5/targets/x86_64-linux/lib"
